sales.title:
Heritage World Coin Auctions - Showcase Auction 61605, Lot 23058 — Ancients
Vespasian (AD 69-79). AE dupondius (28mm, 12.88 gm, 7h). NGC Choice VF 4/5 - 3/5, Fine Style. Rome, AD 73. IMP CAES VESP AVG P M T P COS IIII CENS, radiate head of Vespasian left / FELICITA-S
sales.description:
Ancients
Vespasian (AD 69-79). AE dupondius (28mm, 12.88 gm, 7h). NGC Choice VF 4/5 - 3/5, Fine Style. Rome, AD 73. IMP CAES VESP AVG P M T P COS IIII CENS, radiate head of Vespasian left / FELICITA-S-PVBLICA, Felicitas standing facing, head left, caduceus in outstretched right hand, cornucopia cradled in left arm; S-C across fields. RIC II.1 581. Wonderful pistachio patina. 

Ex Numismatica Ars Classica, Auction 51 (5 March 2009), lot 223. 

Descended from a family of small-time entrepreneurs...

sales.description:
Ancients
Domitian, as Augustus (AD 81-96). AE dupondius (28mm, 12.68 gm, 5h). NGC Choice Fine 5/5 - 2/5, scratches. Rome, AD 90-91. IMP CAES DOMIT AVG GERM COS XV CENS PER P P, radiate head of Domitian right / VIRTVTI-AVGVSTI, Virtus standing facing, head right, left foot on helmet, grounded reversed spear in right hand, parazonium cradled in left arm; S-C across fields. RIC II.1 706.

Ex Salon Numizmatyczny Mateusz Wójcicki, private sale with old dealer's tag included.
